It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.

claim_status_justification: The claim is supported as img_1 clearly displays significant damage to the rear of the vehicle. The image shows the rear bumper cover is missing, exposing the underlying metal reinforcement bar, and confirms the presence of a severe dent and deformation on the trunk lid.
